NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WinForms.​UIFactory
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IUIFactory
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WinForms.​UIFactory

UI factory for WinForms .NET Core interface.  Note that it expects to be created on your main UI thread.

Variables
_applicationIcon
protected Icon? _applicationIcon

Icon used on various windows shown by NetSparkleUpdater

_syncContext
private SynchronizationContext _syncContext
Functions
UIFactory
public UIFactory()
UIFactory
public UIFactory(
Icon? 
applicationIcon
)
Properties
HideReleaseNotes
public bool HideReleaseNotes {
get;
set
}
HideSkipButton
public bool HideSkipButton {
get;
set
}
HideRemindMeLaterButton
public bool HideRemindMeLaterButton {
get;
set
}
ReleaseNotesHTMLTemplate
public string? ReleaseNotesHTMLTemplate {
get;
set
}
AdditionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML
public string? AdditionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML {
get;
set
}
ReleaseNotesDateTimeFormat
public string ReleaseNotesDateTimeFormat {
get;
set
}

The DateTime.ToString() format used when formatting dates to show in the release notes header. NetSparkle is not responsible for what happens if you send a bad format! :)

ReleaseNotesGrabberOverride
public ReleaseNotesGrabber? ReleaseNotesGrabberOverride {
get;
set
}

Easily set / override the ReleaseNotesGrabber used by the UpdateAvailableWindow.  Note that this will NOT automatically use the UIFactory ReleaseNotesHTMLTemplate, AdditionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML, and ReleaseNotesDateTimeFormat that you may have set on the UIFactory - you must set these on this manual override yourself!

Use this if you want to easily override the ReleaseNotesGrabber with your own subclass.

Delegates
FormHandler
public delegate void FormHandler(
Form 
form,
UIFactory 
factory
)

A delegate for handling forms that are created by a UIFactory

Parameters
form
Form

Form that has been created and initialized

factory
UIFactory

UIFactory that created the given Form

Properties
ProcessFormAfterInit
public FormHandler? ProcessFormAfterInit {
get;
set
}

Set this property to manually do any other setup on a Form after it has been created by the UIFactory.  Can be used to tweak styles or perform other operations on the Form, etc.

ConvertDialogResultToDownloadProgressResult
public static bool ConvertDialogResultToDownloadProgressResult(
DialogResult 
dialogResult
)

Method performs simple conversion of DialogResult to boolean.  This method is a convenience when upgrading legacy code.

Parameter
dialogResult
DialogResult

WinForms DialogResult instance

Returns

Boolean based on dialog result

ConvertDialogResultToUpdateAvailableResult
public static UpdateAvailableResult ConvertDialogResultToUpdateAvailableResult(
DialogResult 
dialogResult
)

Method performs simple conversion of DialogResult to UpdateAvailableResult.  This method is a convenience when upgrading legacy code.

Parameter
dialogResult
DialogResult

WinForms DialogResult instance

Returns

Enumeration value based on dialog result
